title: Unsecured load shifted on FLT during cornering
description: Pallet load tilted while turning at 5 mph; no contact with persons or structures. Stop-work called; load resecured.
root_cause: Load not wrapped to standard; cornering speed exceeded site guideline for partial-height loads.
corrective_actions: Refresher on load securing standard for FLT operators (completed 2026-04-01).
Spot checks on wrap quality for third-party pallets — 2-week cadence.
Posted cornering speed reminder at aisle C12.
